# Branding decision (CMO)
Positioning: the anti-spreadsheet cash clarity tool for the Brazilian MEI. Tone: plain, trustworthy, non-finance-jargon.
Variations to test: A "Saiba hoje se deu lucro" vs B "Seu caixa fechado todo dia". Metric: hero CTA click-through. Triggers: +scale at >6% CTR; -change at <2%.
